name: tdl-playbook
description: Threat Detection Engineering Playbook — DaaC library with 700+ ATT&CK-mapped rules, multi-SIEM query support, log source recommendation engine, and attack chain correlation

scripts.all: npm run index && npm run validate && npm run coverage && python3 tools/chain_eval.py && python3 tools/sigma_gen.py && node tools/exporter.js
scripts.ci: npm run validate && python3 tools/chain_eval.py --output exports/chain_coverage.json
